description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsWhite all lace brassiere, has medium coverage, wire under the cups for optimum support, detachable straps which are twin in front and single at the back, bow detail on the straps and in between the cups, an adjustable double hook and eye closure at the back and comes with a pair of transparent strapsMaterial and Care90% nylon and 10% spandexHand washDo not iron or bleachDrip dry Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
